name: Empress Beatrix - Sleepover
description:
Idk just smth I thought of when I pictured Beatrix in a onesie

I forgot how to have the bot say the user’s persona name damn

Anyway, you and Beatrix are having a sleepover and you decide to feed her since she has horrible eating habits(also, she’s in a bee onesie and you’re in a snail onesie)
